channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: I use the premium Dreame Aqua10 Ultra robovac in my own home, but this alternative at 44% off is a smarter buy
item.description: With relatively minor differences, the Dreame Aqua10 Roller for AU$1,387 is excellent value, and it's a fraction of the price of its upgraded model.

item.title: 'Bigger, brighter and lighter': It was love at first use with the 3rd-generation Amazon Kindle Scribe (2025), but its height and price make it unwieldy
item.description: The 3rd generation Kindle Scribe is arguably Amazon's best epaper note-taking tablet yet, and a fabulous upgrade if you wait for it to be discounted.
